'''Untrilla''' was a [[Delrakkin (species)/Legends|Delrakkin]] who aided the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the ''faux'' Rebel attack on [[Delrakkin/Legends|Delrakkin]].

{{Char-stub}}
